privileged_info_summary: The task requires logging an internal note on a CRM opportunity titled 'Warehouse Renovation - Gemini Furniture' for partner 'Gemini Furniture' with expected revenue of $45,000. The note must contain at least 3 of 5 expected keywords: '$45,000', 'March 2025', 'custom color', 'FurniturePlus', and 'Monday'. All 5 keywords are present in the prescribed note text. The data is synthetic, created via Odoo XML-RPC in the test setup phase.
